test_cases.description: Verify that the TaskForm renders input fields for title, description, priority, due date, and user name.
test_cases.name: renders_all_form_fields

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with required props
test_setup.then: Title, Description, Priority dropdown, Due Date input, and User Name input fields are present in the DOM
test_setup.when: Component loads

test_cases.description: Filling all fields and submitting should call onSubmit with correct data.
test_cases.name: successful_form_submission

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered with a mock onSubmit handler
test_setup.then: onSubmit is called once with an object containing title, description, priority, due date, and user name
test_setup.when: User fills all fields with valid data and submits the form

test_cases.description: Submitting the form without a title should not call onSubmit (title is required).
test_cases.name: submit_missing_title

test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called
test_setup.when: User leaves the title field empty and submits the form

test_cases.description: Submitting the form without a description (if not required) should still call onSubmit with an empty description.
test_cases.name: submit_missing_description

test_setup.then: onSubmit is called with description as an empty string
test_setup.when: User fills all fields except description and submits the form

test_cases.update_reason: Description is actually required per requirement; expected behavior must change.

test_cases.description: Submitting the form without selecting a priority should not call onSubmit (priority is required).
test_cases.name: submit_missing_priority

test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called
test_setup.when: User fills all fields except priority and submits the form

test_cases.description: Submitting the form without a due date should not call onSubmit (due date is required).
test_cases.name: submit_missing_due_date

test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called
test_setup.when: User fills all fields except due date and submits the form

test_cases.description: Submitting the form without a user name should not call onSubmit (user name is required).
test_cases.name: submit_missing_user_name

test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called
test_setup.when: User fills all fields except user name and submits the form

test_cases.description: Submitting the form with all fields empty should not call onSubmit.
test_cases.name: submit_all_fields_empty

test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called
test_setup.when: User submits the form with all fields empty

test_cases.description: The priority field should have Low, Medium, and High as selectable options.
test_cases.name: renders_priority_options

test_setup.then: Priority options should include Low, Medium, and High
test_setup.when: User interacts with the priority dropdown

test_cases.description: The due date input should accept a valid date format (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD).
test_cases.name: accepts_valid_due_date_format

test_setup.then: The value is accepted and can be submitted
test_setup.when: User enters a valid date in the due date field

test_cases.description: Test if a very long title (e.g., 255 characters) can be entered and submitted.
test_cases.name: title_field_max_length

test_setup.then: onSubmit is called with the long title included
test_setup.when: User enters a 255 character title and submits

test_cases.description: After a successful submission, the form fields should reset to empty/default values.
test_cases.name: form_resets_after_successful_submit

test_setup.given: TaskForm is rendered and user submits valid data
test_setup.then: All fields are cleared or set to their default state
test_setup.when: Submission is successful

test_cases.description: The form should allow multiple successive submissions without page reload.
test_cases.name: multiple_successive_submissions

test_setup.then: onSubmit is called once per submission with the correct data each time
test_setup.when: User submits valid data multiple times in succession

test_cases.description: Verify that there is no cancel button if not specified in the UI.
test_cases.name: no_cancel_button_present

test_setup.then: No cancel button is present in the form
test_setup.when: User looks for a cancel button

test_cases.description: Submitting fields with only whitespace should be treated as empty and not allow submission.
test_cases.name: submit_fields_with_whitespace

test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called
test_setup.when: User enters only spaces in required fields and submits

test_cases.description: Submitting an invalid due date format should prevent submission.
test_cases.name: reject_invalid_date_format

test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called
test_setup.when: User enters an invalid date format

test_cases.description: Priority field should default to no selection.
test_cases.name: priority_default_state

test_setup.then: Priority dropdown shows no preselected value
test_setup.when: Component loads

test_cases.description: Whitespace-only user name should be treated as empty.
test_cases.name: user_name_whitespace_rejected

test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called
test_setup.when: User enters only spaces in the user name field and submits

test_cases.description: Whitespace-only title should not allow submission.
test_cases.name: title_whitespace_rejected

test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called
test_setup.when: User enters only spaces in the title field and submits

test_cases.description: Submitting with the shortest valid title and description should succeed.
test_cases.name: submit_with_minimal_valid_values

test_setup.then: onSubmit is called with provided minimal values
test_setup.when: User enters title='A', description='A', and other fields valid

test_cases.description: Confirm whether due dates in the past are allowed; default behavior is to accept them.
test_cases.name: date_in_past_allowed

test_setup.then: onSubmit is called with the past date
test_setup.when: User enters a due date in the past

test_cases.description: Ensure extremely future due dates are accepted.
test_cases.name: date_in_far_future

test_setup.then: onSubmit is called
test_setup.when: User enters a due date far in the future (e.g., year 2100)

test_cases.description: Submit button should not trigger onSubmit when form is invalid.
test_cases.name: submit_while_form_invalid

test_setup.then: onSubmit is not called
test_setup.when: User clicks submit with any required field missing

test_cases.description: Form should submit when pressing Enter in any input field.
test_cases.name: keyboard_submission

test_setup.then: onSubmit is called with valid data
test_setup.when: User presses Enter in an input field
